## Summary

- What changed:
- Related paper(s):
- Related taxonomy category:

## Paper Note Checklist

For completed paper-reading notes:

- [ ] I used `docs/paper-note-template.md`.
- [ ] I kept all required template sections.
- [ ] I filled the primary taxonomy category and cross-tags.
- [ ] I included the original paper link.
- [ ] I summarized the method, metric, system, or scaling claim.
- [ ] I captured important equations or scoring rules, or marked the section `N/A`.
- [ ] I summarized important figures and tables, or marked the section `N/A`.
- [ ] I documented data, models, baselines, and metrics.
- [ ] I made the data-quality angle explicit.
- [ ] I included limitations, failure modes, and reproducibility status.

## Validation

- [ ] README links still work.
- [ ] New paper entries link `阅读笔记` to `docs/paper-note-template.md`.
- [ ] New paper entries include a `PPT` link to `docs/ppts/README.md`.
- [ ] The note follows the taxonomy in `docs/taxonomy.md`.

## PPT Checklist

For PPT uploads:

- [ ] The source `.pptx` is uploaded under `docs/ppts/files/`.
- [ ] The PDF preview is uploaded under `docs/ppts/previews/`.
- [ ] The matching row in `docs/ppts/README.md` links both files.
- [ ] The README paper entry links to the matching PPT row.
